title: Dry Bulk Shipping - September 25, 2018
summary: Capesize rates have bottomed - Following the recent steep correction in Capesize rates, we believe the Atlantic Capesize cargo flow should increase - There has been a lull of Atlantic Capesize fixings in the last Capesize rates will move higher but might not reach new highs - The recent correction was deeper than Trade volumes are not the reason for this year's increase in rates - Trade volume growth year-to-date is Fleet growth should end up at ~3% for the year - Despite a relatively manageable orderbook, the total Short-term outlook positive - We expect Capesize rates to jump above 20,000/day in the short term, and
